content:
<!-- type: async-api lang: yaml -->

```yaml
_sdd:
  id: result-backend-async-api
  source: crates/cclab-queue/src/backend/mod.rs

trait: ResultBackend
bounds: Send + Sync + 'static

methods:
  # --- Task CRUD ---
  set_state:
    params:
      task_id: "&TaskId"
      state: TaskState
    returns: "Result<(), TaskError>"
    semantics: upsert state key with default TTL

  get_state:
    params:
      task_id: "&TaskId"
    returns: "Result<Option<TaskState>, TaskError>"
    semantics: returns None if key not found

  set_result:
    params:
      task_id: "&TaskId"
      result: TaskResult
      ttl: "Option<Duration>"
    returns: "Result<(), TaskError>"
    semantics: writes both state and result keys atomically (best-effort)

  get_result:
    params:
      task_id: "&TaskId"
    returns: "Result<Option<TaskResult>, TaskError>"
    semantics: returns None if key not found

  wait_for_result:
    params:
      task_id: "&TaskId"
      timeout: "Option<Duration>"
      poll_interval: Duration
    returns: "Result<TaskResult, TaskError>"
    semantics: polls get_state until is_terminal(), then get_result; returns Timeout on expiry
    defaults:
      redis_timeout: 3600s
      ion_timeout: caller-supplied (no default)

  delete:
    params:
      task_id: "&TaskId"
    returns: "Result<(), TaskError>"
    semantics: deletes both state and result keys

  # --- Batch/Health ---
  get_many:
    params:
      task_ids: "&[TaskId]"
    returns: "Result<Vec<Option<TaskResult>>, TaskError>"
    semantics: batch fetch; returns empty Vec for empty input (Redis MGET, Ion mget)

  health_check:
    params: {}
    returns: "Result<(), TaskError>"
    semantics: connection liveness probe (Redis GET, Ion ping)

  # --- Metadata ---
  set_metadata:
    params:
      key: "&str"
      value: "serde_json::Value"
      ttl: "Option<Duration>"
    returns: "Result<(), TaskError>"
    semantics: stores workflow tracking data under meta key prefix

  get_metadata:
    params:
      key: "&str"
    returns: "Result<Option<serde_json::Value>, TaskError>"
    semantics: returns None if key not found

  delete_metadata:
    params:
      key: "&str"
    returns: "Result<(), TaskError>"
    semantics: removes metadata key

key_schemas:
  redis:
    state: "{key_prefix}:state:{task_id}"
    result: "{key_prefix}:result:{task_id}"
    metadata: "{key_prefix}:meta:{key}"
    default_prefix: cclab-meteor
  ion:
    state: "{key_prefix}:state:{task_id}"
    result: "{key_prefix}:result:{task_id}"
    metadata: "{key_prefix}:meta:{key}"
    default_prefix: meteor

config_schemas:
  RedisBackendConfig:
    url: { type: string, default: "redis://localhost:6379" }
    key_prefix: { type: string, default: cclab-meteor }
    default_ttl: { type: Duration, default: 86400s }
    pool_size: { type: usize, default: 10 }
  IonBackendConfig:
    url: { type: string, default: "127.0.0.1:16380" }
    key_prefix: { type: string, default: meteor }
    default_ttl: { type: "Option<Duration>", default: 86400s }
    connect_timeout: { type: Duration, default: 5s }
    request_timeout: { type: Duration, default: 30s }
```
